title: Register Fee Increase
description: The Court proposes raising the Register fee for all operating licenses by 15 Marks.
effect: All shop prices increase by 5% for 7 days.

title: Expanded Field Licenses
description: The League proposes allowing licensed operators to conduct work in the outer districts without additional permits.
effect: High-danger district access restrictions reduced for 5 days.

title: Compact Patrol Expansion
description: The Compact proposes doubling patrol frequency in the Warrens and Hollows.
effect: Tallow Ring standing decreases by 10. Hollows access temporarily restricted.

title: Merrow Customs Seal Authority
description: House Merrow petitions for exclusive customs-seal authority over all cargo entering Ash Quay. The Compact contests jurisdiction.
effect: If passed: House Merrow standing +8, Civic Compact standing -5. Ash Quay trade fees increase by 10%.

title: Compact Jurisdiction Over Transit Tolls
description: The Compact moves to reassert transit authority over Ash Quay, invalidating Merrow customs agreements with southern traders.
effect: If passed: Civic Compact standing +6, House Merrow standing -8. Harbor Ward tension decreases by 15.

title: Mandatory Ironworks Safety Inspections
description: The League proposes quarterly safety inspections of all Ring-supplied raw material channels running through the Ironworks.
effect: If passed: Foundry League standing +6, Tallow Ring standing -6. Ironworks market pressure decreases by 10.

title: Ring Supply Chain Exemption
description: The Tallow Ring moves to exempt their existing Ironworks supply contracts from League safety oversight, citing operational continuity.
effect: If passed: Tallow Ring standing +5, Foundry League standing -4. City corruption increases by 5.

title: Pale District Welfare Allocation
description: The Restored proposes allocating city funds to support displaced residents in The Pale. The Court objects to the budget impact.
effect: If passed: Restored standing +8, Gilded Court standing -5. City unrest decreases by 8. City prosperity decreases by 3.

title: Fiscal Austerity Directive
description: The Court proposes cutting welfare disbursements to The Pale and Warrens by 30%, citing budget overruns from reconstruction costs.
effect: If passed: Gilded Court standing +5, Restored standing -7. City unrest increases by 10. City prosperity increases by 4.

title: Hollows Security Contract
description: The Compact proposes awarding a district security contract for The Hollows to a licensed enforcement company, displacing Ring-operated protection rackets.
effect: If passed: Civic Compact standing +7, Tallow Ring standing -8. Hollows danger level decreases by 1 for 10 days.

title: Warrens Self-Governance Petition
description: The Restored petitions for a provisional self-governance charter in the Warrens, reducing Compact enforcement presence in exchange for community accountability.
effect: If passed: Restored standing +6, Civic Compact standing -4. Warrens unrest decreases by 12.

title: Harbor Access Fee Revision
description: The Compact proposes increasing Harbor Ward access fees for non-credentialed traders, citing maintenance costs for dock infrastructure.
effect: If passed: Civic Compact standing +5, Harbor Ward market pressure increases by 10 for 7 days.

title: Merrow Free Transit Clause
description: House Merrow moves to establish a free-transit clause for pre-approved cargo moving between Ash Quay and the Harbor, bypassing Compact inspection fees.
effect: If passed: House Merrow standing +7, Civic Compact standing -5. Harbor Ward market pressure decreases by 8.
